title: thea melliana
intro: Thea melliana, also known as Yunnan tea or Dianhong, is a variety of black tea native to the Yunnan province in China. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, including flavonoids and catechins, which are known for their antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Thea melliana include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Thea melliana include tea bags, loose-leaf tea, and capsules, which can be consumed hot or cold, depending on personal preference.
